patch:
--- a/firmware.c
+++ b/firmware.c
@@ -4,10 +4,11 @@
 
 #include <stdint.h>
 
-#define WDT_TIMEOUT_1S    0
-#define WDT_TIMEOUT_2S    1
-#define WDT_TIMEOUT_4S    2
-#define WDT_TIMEOUT_8S    3
+#define WDT_TIMEOUT_500MS 0
+#define WDT_TIMEOUT_1S    1
+#define WDT_TIMEOUT_2S    2
+#define WDT_TIMEOUT_4S    3
+#define WDT_TIMEOUT_8S    4
 
 void wdt_init(uint8_t timeout_sel);
 void wdt_kick(void);
description: A new WDT_TIMEOUT_500MS macro was prepended at value 0, shifting all existing timeout selector values by one so callers using named macros get wrong timeouts silently.
